reviews.review_description: long time Om Nom Fan, Purchased on 22-10-2019. I wish i wouldn't, Why candy throw is not simple trigger action. also laser pointer sight get invisible in candy throw. highly in accurate candy throw action builds frustration nothing else. why can't it be made simple trigger action with laser sight enabled in option menu if the user doesn't wish to fiddle with go remote throw.
IT WILL NOT LET ME UNINSTALL IT
smooth object Finding game, and cute om nom, and variety imaginary places :D

But short...... :(

BTW: Can we pet him? :)

developer_response.body: Thank you for appreciating our efforts! We work hard to meet expectations like yours. It's good to know that we are on the right track!

reviews.review_description: My kids love this game except for the candy throw! Please fix!

I'm experiencing weird visuals where all textures except Om Nom are loading as flickering lines. I've tried removing and reinstalling, tried sd and system storage, and cant find anything about this online.

developer_response.body:
Hello, Xazureflamesx!

Thanks so much for reaching out to us!

It’s not our usual standard, and we understand how frustrating this must be, but don't worry. We'll help you sort this situation out.

If you downloaded the app on Gear VR, please, delete it and install from the Store once again. This should fix the problem. As you've already purchased the app, from now on it will be free for further downloads and will work properly.

If the problem persists after reinstallation or if you downloaded the app for Oculus GO, please, contact us at support@zeptolab.com, and we will do our best to help you as fast as possible!

Please, receive our apologies for the inconvenience! We look forward to providing a much better experience.

Best wishes,
ZeptoLab Support Team

reviews.review_title: Flawed controls  make this game unplayab
reviews.review_description: Great immersion and graphics.  But feeding Om Nom is so poorly done.  You’re supposed to flick your hand to throw the candy but the effect doesn’t work correctly and it gets very frustrating.  Such a shame to an otherwise good game.

reviews.review_title: Good simple fun but a little repetitive
reviews.review_description: Very nice graphics. You do need to be eagle eyed spotting some items tho! Not entirely sure why those items are needed to repair portal! It does get a bit samey after the 6th level. Also using the motion controller throwing the candy often goes a bit off. Otherwise very nice use of pointer and torch.

The game is very repetitive, and it is very hard to throw food. Love the art though. And what is my reward for saving him over and over and over again?
Worse, now I reached a state where I have simple problems of throwing food as the controller keep acting up and throw in different directions! Now I am stuck!

reviews.review_description: Needs updating for bad controls,otherwise would be five stars
